title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at IndiGo Cargo - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at IndiGo Cargo - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the IndiGo Cargo family as a Distribution Manager in Raipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IndiGo Cargo:
IndiGo Cargo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiGo Cargo!
